insights.description: 1.12-day gap between spec PR merge (Mar 26) and first AutoPR creation (Mar 27) — automated SDK generation triggered quickly. .NET PR was opened manually 22 days earlier.
5.7-day wait for first human review on spec PR — yangylu91 opened Feb 13, first review from mattgotteiner on Feb 18
.NET SDK PR was manually authored (by efrainretana), took 22.3 days — includes Copilot-assisted development (branch named 'copilot')
Mixed generation flow: .NET was manual (human-authored with Copilot assist), Java/Go/Python/JS were automated (AutoPR). All 5 SDK PRs merged within ~6 days of spec merge.
1 author nag(s) detected — spec owner had to ping reviewers for action
Spec PR took 41.8 days (Feb 13 to Mar 26) — extensive review with 9 reviewers covering API design, descriptions, and ARM compliance
25 MCP tool calls tracked across all SDK languages — 13 succeeded, 12 failed. Tool calls cover build, test, release, and version update operations.
